surfaces.name: DogeLayer proxy API reference
surfaces.notes: Documents the /api/workers/stats and /api/workers/timerange proxy endpoints. The doc page itself is public with no auth; the underlying proxy API it describes requires a Bearer token and has no published OpenAPI/Swagger spec, so this is filed as docs rather than subnet-api.

surfaces.name: DogeLayer PoolInfo SCALE type registry
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth JSON PortableRegistry schema defining the SN80 DogeLayer PoolInfo on-chain commitment structure (pool_index, ip, port, domain, username, password, high_diff_port). Published in the official dogelayer-ai/dogelayer repository and loaded by dogelayer/core/chain_data/pool_info.py for encode_pool_info/decode_pool_info when validators publish stratum pool metadata to the chain.

surfaces.name: DogeLayer TaoMarketCap subnet snapshot API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /public/v1/subnets/80 on api.taomarketcap.com returning machine-readable JSON for SN80 on-chain subnet state, SubnetIdentitiesV3 metadata, economics, and dTAO market fields. DogeLayer's documented proxy API requires Bearer auth and has no verified no-auth first-party public endpoint; this indexed feed is documented in the TaoMarketCap developer API.
